signals.title: Bitcoin is cratering, but a new Wall Street crypto hype is on the rise
signals.summary: As bitcoin dropped to its lowest price since 2024, investors flock to a new type of crypto investment linked to the hyperliquid platforms, HYPE ETFs.

signals.title: Tech stock sell-off accelerates; SoftBank drops 6% as investors sour on AI-linked names
signals.summary: Global tech stocks tracked overnight losses in U.S. tech names led by a sell-off in Broadcom.

signals.title: NASA to select new headquarters building by end of year
signals.summary:
NASA plans to find a new headquarters building by the end of this year while remaining in the Washington area. 
 The post  NASA to select new headquarters building by end of year  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
signals.summary: The president said he would like to see the weaponization fund proceed despite setbacks.

signals.title: Inside the Obama-era Iran nuclear deal that Trump withdrew from
signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran have yet to reach a peace deal or address Iran's nuclear ambitions, despite signals from Trump that talks are progressing.

signals.title: MSG shares surge on Knicks Finals run ahead of Trump's expected Game 3 visit
NASA interested in Hubble reboost if costs can be reduced
signals.summary:
As NASA prepares an attempt to reboost an astronomy spacecraft in a decaying orbit, it is open to doing something similar for Hubble, if its operating costs can be reduced. 
 The post  NASA interested in Hubble reboost if costs can be reduced  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NASA concerns about Russian repairs prompted ISS safe haven decision
signals.summary:
NASA directed astronauts on the ISS to shelter in a Crew Dragon spacecraft after Russian cosmonauts planned to perform repairs the agency thought created “elevated risk” to the station. 
 The post  NASA concerns about Russian repairs prompted ISS safe haven decision  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Rising load growth reshapes cooperative portfolios and strategy
signals.summary: Large loads pose additional challenges for cooperatives. Planning strategically is critical.

signals.title: The benefits of a unified billing, payment, communications platform
signals.summary: One platform. Fewer silos. Better billing and payment experiences for utilities and customers.

signals.title: How live conversations can close the gap between awareness and enrollment for load flexibility
signals.summary: The data on outbound calling: higher enrollments, strong sentiment, surprising insights

signals.title: Speed as a Strategic Advantage in Border Monitoring
signals.summary:
Across Europe, border environments are becoming increasingly dynamic and complex. Activity can shift within hours—vehicles reposition, staging areas disperse, small watercraft alter routes, and nodes of activity appear and disappear […] 
 The post  Speed as a Strategic Advantage in Border Monitoring  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.

signals.title: Iran announces 'end of military operations' against Israel, but warns Lebanon strikes could trigger escalation
signals.summary: Iran and Israel traded strikes on Sunday night for the first time since a ceasefire was agreed in April, threatening to torpedo an already-fragile ceasefire.

signals.title: United CEO brushes off airline mergers after American rejection: 'There's nothing'
signals.summary: When asked about a wave of consolidation among airlines, Kirby said further combination opportunities look unlikely: "There's nothing."

signals.title: Weight loss drug maker sinks 25% after new safety data spooks investors
signals.summary: While the experimental drug met its key targets, analysts are concerned over the commercial opportunity due to side effects.

signals.title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
signals.summary: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.

signals.title: Italian coffee giant Lavazza launches single-serve tablets to make espresso in the U.S.
signals.summary: With Tablì, Lavazza is betting that sustainability is still a top consideration for many coffee drinkers.

signals.title: Retirees fear running out of money. Many are spending too little instead
signals.summary: Retirees often focus on the risk of spending too much in retirement. But spending too little poses another kind of danger.

signals.title: U.S. confirms second Texas screwworm case, Canada restricts livestock imports
signals.summary: New World screwworm larvae feed on the living tissue of warm-blooded animals, creating severe wounds that can be fatal if left untreated.
